heading: Example Queries
body:
Click the Query button to the right of the index to
query.

Click Edit Query to view a default query syntax
sample in JSON (Javascript Object Notation) format.

Copy and paste the following query into the Query Editor,
and then click the Search button in the
Query Editor.

The following examples use the `compound` operator with subqueries
to search for movies between the years `2013` to `2015` with the
term `snow` in the `title` field.

The Search Tester might not display all the fields in the
documents it returns. To view all the fields, including the field that
you specify in the query path, expand the document in
the results.

- Copy and paste the following query into the Query
  Editor.

  Bury Documents in a Category

  The query uses the [$search](pipe.$search) `compound`
  operator `should` clause to nest `compound` operator
  queries that perform the following actions:

  - Searches for movies that contain the term `ghost` in the
    plot or title (`must` clause) and aren't in the `comedy`
    genre (`mustNot` clause).

  - Searches for movies that contain the term `ghost` in the
    plot or title (`must` clause), but reduces (`boost`) the
    score by 50% (`0.5`) for movies in the `comedy` genre with
    the term `ghost` in the title or plot.

  ```json
  [
    {
      "$search": {
        "index": "default",
        "compound": {
          "should":[ {
            "compound":{
              "must":[ 
                {
                  "text": {
                    "query": "ghost",
                    "path": ["plot","title"]
                  }
                } 
              ],
              "mustNot":[ 
                {
                  "text": {
                    "query": "Comedy",
                    "path": ["genres"]
                  }
                } 
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "compound":{
              "must":[ 
                {
                  "text": {
                    "query": "ghost",
                    "path": ["plot","title"]
                  }
                } 
              ],
              "filter":[ 
                {
                  "text": {
                    "query": "Comedy",
                    "path": ["genres"]
                  }
                } 
              ],
              "score":{ "boost": { "value": 0.5} }
              }
            } 
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ]
  ```

  Bury Specified Documents

  The query uses the [$search](pipe.$search) `compound`
  operator `should` clause to nest `compound` operator
  queries that perform the following actions:

  - Searches for movies that contain the term `ghost` in
    the plot or title (`must` clause), but doesn't have
    the specified ObjectIds (`mustNot` clause).

  - Searches for movies that contain the term `ghost` in
    the plot or title (`must` clause), but reduces
    (`boost`) the score by 50% (`0.5`) for movies with
    the specified ObjectIds (`filter` clause).

  ```json
  [
    {
      "$search": {
        "index": "default",        
        "compound": {
          "should":[ 
            {
              "compound":{
                "must":[ 
                  {
                    "text": {
                      "query": "ghost",
                      "path": ["plot","title"]
                    }
                  } 
                ],
                "mustNot":[ 
                  {
                    "in": {
                      "value": [ObjectId('573a13cdf29313caabd83c08'), ObjectId('573a13cef29313caabd873a2')],
                      "path": "_id"
                    }
                  } 
                ]
              }
            },
            {
              "compound":{
                "must":[ 
                  {
                    "text": {
                      "query": "ghost",
                      "path": ["plot","title"]
                    }
                  } 
                ],
                "filter":[ 
                  {
                    "in": {
                      "value": [ObjectId('573a13cdf29313caabd83c08'), ObjectId('573a13cef29313caabd873a2')],
                      "path": "_id"
                    }
                  } 
                ],
                "score":{ "boost": { "value": 0.5} }
              }
            } 
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ]
  ```

- Click the Search button in the Query Editor.

  Bury by Genre

  ```shell
  SCORE: 5.909613132476807
  _id:  “573a139af29313caabcefcce”
  plot: "Adaption of the famous Oscar Wilde tale about a young American girl th…"
  genres: Array (3)
  runtime: 92

  SCORE: 5.367666244506836
  _id:  “573a13d8f29313caabda5dc1”
  plot: "The Little Ghost lives in the castle over looking a small town and awa…"
  genres: Array (2)
  runtime: 92

  SCORE: 4.676314353942871
  _id:  “573a13c0f29313caabd6139d”
  plot: "Renowned "ghost hunter", Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal …"
  genres: Array (2)
  runtime: 107

  plot: "A man tries to solve his lover's murder by communicating with her spir…"
  genres: Array (3)
  runtime: 115

  _id:  “573a13cef29313caabd873a2”
  plot: "A man tries to solve his lover's murder by communicating with her spir…"
  genres: Array (3)
  runtime: 115

  _id:  “573a13c3f29313caabd6a149”
  plot: "What kind of scenes in a horror film scares you the most? When a ghost…"

  runtime: 95

  SCORE: 3.3177831172943115
  _id:  “573a1397f29313caabce7ea1”
  plot: "Four successful elderly gentlemen, members of the Chowder Society, sha…"
  genres: Array (3)
  runtime: 110

  SCORE: 3.3177831172943115
  _id:  “573a13a4f29313caabd117df”
  fullplot: "When the motorcyclist Johnny Blaze finds that his father Barton Blaze …"
  imdb: Object
  year: 2007

  SCORE: 3.3177831172943115
  _id:  “573a13a6f29313caabd185dc”
  fullplot: "After discovering a passenger ship missing since 1962 floating adrift …"
  imdb: Object
  year: 2002
  ```

  The movie documents in the results contain the query term `ghost` in
  the `plot` or `title` field and aren't in the `Comedy` genre.
  MongoDB Search didn't return documents in the `Comedy` genre with the term
  `ghost` in the `plot` or `title` field because those documents
  didn't rank in the top 10 documents since the query reduced the score
  of those documents by 50%.

  Bury by ID

  ```shell
  _id:  “573a1397f29313caabce7ea1”

  genres: Array (3)
  runtime: 83
  ```

  The movie documents in the results contain the query term `ghost` in
  the `plot` or `title` field and don't have the specified
  ObjectIds in the `_id` field. MongoDB Search didn't return the documents with
  the specified ObjectsIds, even though they contain the query term
  `ghost` in the `title` field, because the query reduced the score
  of these documents by 50% and so, these documents didn't rank in the
  top 10 documents.
